text:
わあ！　こんなにいっぱい！
集めるの大変だったよね？

すっごく助かったよ。
これでお肉の準備はオッケーだね！

協力してくれてありがとう。
また何かあったらよろし

Wow! It's like I've entered a portal to the
meat dimension! You must've had it rough,
getting this much.

You seriously saved my hide by doing this.
Now I've got more than enough meat
to go around!

Thanks so much for the assist.
I'll let you know if anything else comes up!
